requirement.title: Dependency-Aware Test Execution And Deterministic Validation
requirement.goal: Thuc thi test cases theo dependency chain, resolve variable chaining, goi HTTP that su vao execution environment da chon, va danh gia pass/fail bang rule-based validator. LLM khong duoc tham gia quyet dinh pass/fail.
rationale: TestGeneration da co TestSuite, TestCase, TestCaseRequest, TestCaseExpectation, TestCaseVariable, TestCaseDependency va API order gate; nhung chua co engine thuc thi.
TestExecution da co ExecutionEnvironment va TestRun summary entity; co the reuse ngay ma khong can mo rong DB schema.
FE-09 va FE-10 phu thuoc truc tiep vao execution result cua FE-07+FE-08.
Can giu pass/fail deterministic de ket qua bao cao, so sanh regression va LLM failure explanation co dau vao on dinh.

subRequirements.title: Dependency-aware test execution with variable extraction

inScope: POST bat dau test run theo test suite va execution environment (hoac project default environment).
Load execution context tu TestGeneration qua contract boundary, bao gom ordered test cases, request, expectation, variables, dependencies.
Resolve runtime variables theo precedence: extracted run variables > execution environment variables > literal values trong test case.
Resolve path template, query params, headers, request body placeholders truoc khi goi HTTP.
Ho tro auth runtime cho environment: None, BearerToken, Basic, ApiKey, OAuth2 Client Credentials.
Thuc thi HTTP tuan tu theo dependency graph de bao toan deterministic chaining.
Variable extraction tu response body/header/status theo TestCaseVariable.
Rule-based validation: status code, response schema, header exact-match, body contains/not contains, JSONPath equality, max response time.
Skip dependent test cases neu dependency khong pass.
Luu summary vao testexecution.TestRuns va luu chi tiet ket qua vao distributed cache/Redis bang RedisKey cua TestRun.
Expose APIs de xem run history, run summary, run results chi tiet.
outOfScope: Parallel execution giua cac test case trong cung 1 run.
Background worker, queue-based execution, SignalR real-time progress, webhook trigger, cancellation API.
Deep assertion DSL ngoai shape hien co cua TestCaseExpectation.

requiredFeatures.reason: Reuse ExecutionEnvironment CRUD, default environment, auth config serialization.
Execution chi duoc bat dau khi API order da duoc review/approve/applied.
Reuse happy-path test case entities, request/expectation/variable/dependency shape.
Boundary/negative cases cung duoc thuc thi va validate bang mot engine chung.
Path template placeholders phai duoc resolve dung quy tac da dat ra cho test generation va execution.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration
requiredModules.consumptionPattern: Khong truy cap truc tiep DbContext/Repository tu TestExecution. Phai di qua contract gateway moi trong ClassifiedAds.Contracts.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.ApiDocumentation
requiredModules.consumptionPattern: Dung IApiEndpointMetadataService de lay response schema payloads khi expectation khong co ResponseSchema.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Modules.Subscription
requiredModules.consumptionPattern: Dung ISubscriptionLimitGatewayService de check MaxTestRunsPerMonth, MaxConcurrentRuns, RetentionDays.

requiredModules.name: ClassifiedAds.Contracts.Identity
requiredModules.usage: ICurrentUser de lay user id cho ownership va audit.

newCrossModuleContracts.name: ITestExecutionReadGatewayService
newCrossModuleContracts.purpose: Expose execution-ready TestSuite/TestCase graph tu TestGeneration sang TestExecution ma khong vo modular boundary.

database.reason: TestRun da co summary columns va RedisKey/ResultsExpireAt cho chi tiet. ExecutionEnvironment da co du baseUrl, headers, variables, authConfig.

resultStorage.ttlSource: Subscription limit RetentionDays, fallback 7 days neu limit khong tra ve gia tri hop le

queryStrategy: Khong N+1 queries khi doc execution context tu TestGeneration. Gateway phai load suite + test cases + requests + expectations + variables + dependencies bang cac batch query co filter theo testSuiteId/testCaseIds.
GetTestRuns list API phai paging va projection thang tu TestRun, khong doc payload ket qua tu cache.
Endpoint metadata tu ApiDocumentation phai fetch 1 lan cho tat ca endpoint ids trong run, khong fetch moi test case.
Auth runtime cho OAuth2 phai resolve 1 lan moi run, khong xin access token moi request.
designPrinciples: TestExecution khong reference truc tiep TestGeneration DbContext hay entities.
Validation engine va execution engine tach service rieng de de test va de mo rong.
Rule-based validator khong duoc goi LLM, khong duoc phu thuoc vao prompt output.
Dependent test case chi duoc chay khi tat ca dependencies da Passed.
Explicit request headers/query params co quyen override auth injection de negative test auth khong bi pha.

determinism.description: Cung execution context, cung environment variables va cung API response thi ket qua pass/fail phai giong nhau.

performance.dbRoundTripsPerRunTarget: <= 8 before HTTP loop, excluding cache set/get
performance.singleRunExecutionStyle: Sequential by dependency order, no intra-run parallelism

sensitiveDataRules: Khong expose raw environment auth secrets.
Result payload luu response body preview bi truncate; khong luu binary body day du.
Extracted variables co ten chua token/secret/password/apiKey phai bi mask trong response model.

reliability.transactionForRunNumber: Can Serializable transaction de cap RunNumber khong bi trung tren unique index (TestSuiteId, RunNumber).
gracefulDegradation: Neu response body khong phai JSON thi schema/jsonpath checks fail co kiem soat, khong crash run.
Neu cache details save fail thi run van phai update summary sang Failed va log critical.
Neu endpoint metadata khong co schema payload thi validator bo qua contract schema fallback, khong fail ca run.

acceptanceCriteria: AC-01: POST start test run tao duoc TestRun moi voi RunNumber tang dan theo tung TestSuite va status cuoi la Completed hoac Failed.
AC-02: Neu TestSuite chua Ready hoac FE-05A gate chua pass thi API bi chan truoc khi goi HTTP.
AC-03: He thong co the chay toan bo suite hoac subset selectedTestCaseIds; neu subset thieu dependency thi tra 400.
AC-04: Runtime variables duoc resolve cho URL, path params, query params, headers, body theo precedence da quy dinh.
AC-05: Test case co variable extraction thanh cong se cap nhat variable bag cho cac test case phu thuoc phia sau.
AC-06: Neu test case fail hoac unresolved variable thi tat ca dependents cua no bi mark Skipped.
AC-07: Rule-based validator danh gia dung 6 nhom check: status, schema, headers, body contains, body not contains, JSONPath, max response time.
AC-08: Validation pass/fail khong duoc phu thuoc LLM va khong duoc phu thuoc text explanation.
AC-09: Summary run duoc luu vao testexecution.TestRuns, chi tiet duoc luu vao distributed cache bang RedisKey va ResultsExpireAt.
AC-10: GET test-runs list phan trang duoc va khong doc payload ket qua chi tiet tu cache.
AC-11: GET test-run results tra du thong tin tung test case (resolved request, response preview, validation failures, extracted variables masked) khi cache con han.
AC-12: Neu ket qua da het han cache thi GET results tra 410 RUN_RESULTS_EXPIRED va summary van con trong PostgreSQL.
AC-13: Subscription limits MaxTestRunsPerMonth va MaxConcurrentRuns duoc check truoc khi thuc thi run.
AC-14: Auth runtime cho OAuth2 client credentials chi xin token 1 lan moi run.
AC-15: Khong co migration moi, khong co direct DbContext access xuyen module.
implementationOrder: 1. Tao contract gateway moi trong ClassifiedAds.Contracts va implementation doc execution context trong TestGeneration.
2. Them request/response models, permissions, controller, command/query surface cho TestExecution.
3. Implement runtime environment/auth resolver + variable resolver + HTTP executor.
4. Implement rule-based validator + result collector + distributed cache payload.
5. Hoan thien StartTestRun command handler, query handlers, DI registration, package references neu can.
6. Them unit tests va integration tests cho gateway, resolver, executor, validator, collector, command/query.
